nodes.name: Run an Actor and get dataset

parameters.query:
-- Store or update context in database
INSERT INTO conversation_context (
  conversation_id,
  context_key,
  context_value,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3::jsonb,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (conversation_id, context_key) 
DO UPDATE SET
  context_value = $3::jsonb,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING 
  id,
  conversation_id,
  context_key,
  context_value,
  updated_at;

main.node: Run an Actor and get dataset
